caption: The video captures a scene on a well-lit soccer field at night, with a player walking across the pitch while holding a phone in one hand and a backpack over his shoulder. The stadium seats are empty, creating a serene atmosphere. The player appears to be recording himself or taking a selfie as he moves, occasionally gesturing with his free hand. Subtitles in Spanish appear at the bottom of the screen, translating to "We'll give it our all!" and "Hala Madrid!" indicating a motivational message for the team. In the background, other individuals can be seen on the field, possibly preparing for a training session or game. The overall mood is one of determination and readiness.
